name: clearimpact
description: ClearImpact is a full-stack platform prioritizing transparency in donations. It allows donors to trace their exact funds, provides real-time impact generation capabilities, and creates a clear pathway to real-world change.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
